hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */apps/*/*.ts|*/apps/*/*.tsx) app="${f#*/apps/}"; app="${app%%/*}" ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; [ -z "$app" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm --filter "$app" exec eslint --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
